title: Executive Engineer
description:
Job Highlight:

  • Family Care Leave
  • Central Location (Nearest MRT: Tanjong Pagar)
  • Good career exposure & advancement

Your responsibilities include:

  • Conceptualise engineering design and execute the project with the detailed designs.
  • Oversee project management including overall responsibility over resources, time allocation, cost and quality of project deliverables.
  • Manage and engage client/consultant/contractors and local authorities to drive project execution, resolve issues, submission to authorities and overall on-site construction supervision.
  • Develop good working relationships with clients and partners in the industry.

What you will need:

  • At least 3 years of relevant experience in design and project management of building and land development projects of various project size and typology. (Candidates with more years of experience will be considered for senior role)
  • Strong technical proficiency in engineering analysis and design programmes such as Etabs, Plaxis.
  • Knowledge in temporary works, ERSS will be an advantage.
  • Conversant with local authorities’ requirement and submission procedures.
  • A good track record of being a project / technical lead for significant / key projects.
  • Strong communication, interpersonal skills and stakeholder management skills.

postedCompany.description:
Headquartered in Singapore, RSP Architects Planners & Engineers (Pte) Ltd (RSP) is a global multidisciplinary architectural and engineering design group, with over 65 years of experience, building alongside Singapore. 


At RSP, delivering humanity-centered design is our philosophy. We put forth design that inspires and engages with the society and environment. We embrace spaces for humanity, translate stories into real spaces, and create purposeful designs for a better world. 


We are constantly evolving alongside the changes of tomorrow to make a purposeful impact on the future of the built environment. Our multidisciplinary team of 1,200 industry experts across over 15 markets has successfully completed over 2,500 projects globally, to build spaces that prioritise people, community and environment, while finding innovative ways to bring their unique stories to life through design. From physical spaces to the digital realm and beyond, design permeates every aspect of our work. At RSP, design meets humanity.
postedCompany.name: RSP ARCHITECTS PLANNERS & ENGINEERS (PTE) LTD

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
